subsample_selection: uniform random without replacement, NESTED within the step-3 N=5000 subsample (i.e. drawn from the same sample-ID pool that dimred.py used for the primary sample-centric t-SNE)
note: Full-corpus sample-sample correlation would be an n_samples x n_samples matrix (>5TB float32 at ~700k samples); we sub-sub-sample from the step-3 subsample to make the heatmap storable and legible. The nested draw guarantees cross-figure consistency with dimred.py's primary sample-centric t-SNE.
